characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Affectionate Nickname: They are often called "bambinos", "son" (sans Cici) or "sunshine". Calling Parents by Their Name: They refer to Big Chris and Marsha as is. CatchphraseRoary: Light 'em up!Maxi: Mamma-Mia!Cici: Catch me if you can!Drifter: Go, go, Nitro boost!Tin Top: Hammer me in, tape me up and send me out! Cici: Catch me if you can! Drifter: Go, go, Nitro boost!

characters.name: Roary
characters.description: All-Loving Hero: He is very nice to everyone he meets. Always Someone Better: He feels this way about Maxi. The Baby of the Bunch: He is the youngest and is often reminded of this. Badass Adorable: Is very cute yet capable of beating Maxi's lap record. Brooding Boy, Gentle Girl: Is the brooding boy to Cici's gentle girl.

characters.name: Maxi
characters.description: Accent Adaptation: The US dub gives him a Brooklyn accent. Aesop Amnesia: He often ends up in vulnerable positions as a result of being defiant and/or bullying someone, yet he still continues to act the way he does. Attention Whore: He always wants to be the center of attention. Bratty Half-Pint: He deliberately goes out of his way to be mean to the other cars. Butt-Monkey: Downplayed. He is often the subject of awful things happening to him, yet his friends are always there to help him.

characters.name: Cici
characters.description: Break the Cutie: Poor Cici! She has gone through four frightening moments:"Cici Takes the Blame" has hercrying and feeling depressedafter being barred from the practice lap races for "ruining" Marsha's picnic blanket.Note that this was actually Roary who did this.In "Cici Gets Fired Up", Cici worries herself about being sent to the scrapheap after being stuck in the heavy rain, broken down and out of power."Roary Sees Red" sees Cici going through a lot of sadness when she gets trapped in the mud. A possible reason for her sadness could be because Roary wasenragedtowards Cici after ruining his paintwork.And finally, in "Cici Wins the Day",Maxi makes fun ofCici by telling her that she never wins a race and she never will, causing Cici togive up racing in the big competition that day over Maxi's snarky commentbefore breaking down in depression. "Cici Takes the Blame" has hercrying and feeling depressedafter being barred from the practice lap races for "ruining" Marsha's picnic blanket.Note that this was actually Roary who did this. Note that this was actually Roary who did this. In "Cici Gets Fired Up", Cici worries herself about being sent to the scrapheap after being stuck in the heavy rain, broken down and out of power. "Roary Sees Red" sees Cici going through a lot of sadness when she gets trapped in the mud. A possible reason for her sadness could be because Roary wasenragedtowards Cici after ruining his paintwork.

characters.name: Drifter
characters.description: All Asians Know Martial Arts: Drifter demonstrated this in "Rusty Takes a Trip". Asian and Nerdy: He is Japanese andThe Smart Guy. Asian Drivers: Inverted. He does not crash as much as the other characters - cough cough Tin Top cough. Asian Speekee Engrish: Subverted. He has an obvious accent, yet he speaks English perfectly. Dub Name Change: Renamed to Dragga in the US dub.

characters.name: Tin Top
characters.description: Agent Peacock: While he is very sensitive and has a tendency to be scared of things that seem silly, he is also rather chill in regards to crashes. The Big Guy: He is the biggest and strongest of the cars. Blatant Lies: He claims he isn’t scared of anything. However, throughout the show, he seems scared of a lot of things,, like loud noises and mice. Butt-Monkey: Tends to be on the receiving end of a lot of slapstick. Andcrashes. Chronically Crashed Car: He IS one, given that he's the most crash-prone of all the cars.

characters.name: Big Chris
characters.description: Bumbling Dad: He is generally messy and disorganized. Catchphrase: "If you bend it, you mend it!" Doting Parent: He favors Roary over all the other cars. Family Man: He lives at Silver Hatch to be with his family.

characters.name: Marsha
characters.description: Parental Obliviousness: While Cici tries to explain to Marsha about the picnic incident that she didn't do (because she wasn't there when it happened), she didn't buy Cici's truth and thought she was lying. You Are Grounded!: Zig-Zagged. She punishes Cici for allegedly ruining her picnic blanket, yet it wasn't her fault, and she had absolutely nothing to do with it at the time and place. When Roary reveals himself as the real culprit, he is not punished, probably because he admits his mistake and Marsha says that's the mark of a true champion.Still, Roary does gradually apologize to Cici for getting her into trouble in the first place (which she's completely let off the hook), followed by Marsha, who also says sorry to Cici for falsely accusing her from earlier, as well as jumping to conclusions; she eventually lets both two racers off the hook. Still, Roary does gradually apologize to Cici for getting her into trouble in the first place (which she's completely let off the hook), followed by Marsha, who also says sorry to Cici for falsely accusing her from earlier, as well as jumping to conclusions; she eventually lets both two racers off the hook.

characters.name: Mr. Carburettor
characters.description: Accent Adaptation: He speaks with a New York-Italian accent in the US dub. Catchphrase: "Mamma-mia!" Doting Parent: He favors Maxi over all the other cars. High-Pressure Emotion: Usually when something goes wrong or Flash gets up to his usual hijinks.
